name: Zucchini/Apple Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 cups loosely packed, grated zucchini with skin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine all dry ingredients: flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
3. In another bowl, mix together sugar, oil, eggs, vanilla, and cinnamon.
4. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
5. Fold in grated apples and walnuts.
6. Pour the mixture into two greased loaf pans.
7. Bake for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the bread to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before removing and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
